# microsoft365_graph_beta_windows_updates_compliance_changes (Data Source)

Retrieves compliance changes (content approvals) for a Windows Update policy using the `/admin/windows/updates/updatePolicies/{updatePolicyId}/complianceChanges` endpoint. This data source lists all content approvals that have been created for a policy, including their revocation status and deployment settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `update_policy_id` (String) The ID of the update policy to query for compliance changes.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `compliance_changes` (Attributes List) List of compliance changes (content approvals) for the policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compliance_changes))

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--compliance_changes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compliance_changes`

Read-Only:

- `content` (Attributes) The content that was approved for deployment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compliance_changes--content))
- `created_date_time` (String) The date and time when the compliance change was created.
- `deployment_settings` (Attributes) Settings for how the approved content should be deployed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compliance_changes--deployment_settings))
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the compliance change.
- `is_revoked` (Boolean) Whether the compliance change has been revoked.
- `revoked_date_time` (String) The date and time when the compliance change was revoked.

<a id="nestedatt--compliance_changes--content"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compliance_changes.content`

Read-Only:

- `catalog_entry_id` (String) The ID of the catalog entry that was approved.
- `catalog_entry_type` (String) The type of catalog entry (featureUpdate, qualityUpdate, driverUpdate).


<a id="nestedatt--compliance_changes--deployment_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compliance_changes.deployment_settings`

Read-Only:

- `schedule` (Attributes) Schedule settings for the deployment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compliance_changes--deployment_settings--schedule))

<a id="nestedatt--compliance_changes--deployment_settings--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compliance_changes.deployment_settings.schedule`

Read-Only:

- `gradual_rollout` (Attributes) Gradual rollout settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compliance_changes--deployment_settings--schedule--gradual_rollout))
- `start_date_time` (String) The date and time when deployment should start.

<a id="nestedatt--compliance_changes--deployment_settings--schedule--gradual_rollout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compliance_changes.deployment_settings.schedule.gradual_rollout`

Read-Only:

- `devices_per_offer` (Number) Number of devices per offer.
- `duration_between_offers` (String) Duration between offers in ISO 8601 format.
